pr.title: Order-13 N-gram Oracle + Score-First TTT (0.0308 BPB)

output.summary: Pre-fill order-2..13 n-gram frequency tables from the 8B token corpus and blend them via a BackoffNgramMixer while using score-first test-time training updates.
techniques: Score-first test-time training with phased scoring before weight updates
BackoffNgramMixer mixes neural logits with order-2..13 pretrained n-gram experts
Training-time n-gram oracle prefill for immediate validation coverage
